name: 3D Asset Pipeline Workflow
description: Promotes the PROMPTING.md Hugging Face asset pipeline: generate a 3D asset, download it into the project, then import it into the live preview — in that order. Matched on asset / model / generate / import keywords.
plan: To add a 3D model, follow the generate → download → import order. First call hf_generate_3d_asset (text-to-3D with provider 'shape-e', or image-to-3D with 'hunyuan3d' / 'trellis' / 'triposr'). Then call download_3d_asset to write the model into the project (approval-gated; the destination gets the right extension). Finally call triangle_import_3d_asset to load it into the live preview and confirm it appears with triangle_describe_scene. Requires an HF token (HF_TOKEN, hfToken setting, or HF OAuth).
